content_en:
And in yet another narration, Faatimah bint Qais % related that, on one day, the Messenger of Allah #¢ delayed the last ‘Eesha; he then came out and said, “I was detained by a Hedeeth that Tameem AdDaaree was relating to me concerning a man on an island from the islands of the sea. (He said), ‘Then I came upon a woman who was dragging her hair. I said: what are you? It said: I am Al-Jassansah; go to that castle. I went to it and came upon a man who was dragging his hair and who was shackled in chains; he was springing in them

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 95

between the sky and the earth. I said: Who are you? He said: Tam the Dajjaal. He (then) said: What have the Arabs done? Has their Prophet come out? I said: Yes. He asked: Did they obey him or disobey him? I said: Rather, they obeyed him. He said: That is better for them.””

Abu Hurairah related that the Messenger of Allah #% stood level on the pulpit and said, “Tameem gave me an account,” and then he 38 saw Tameem on one side of the Masjid and said, “O Tameem, relate to the people that which you related to me.” He #& said, “We were on an island, when we came across a beast, not knowing its front from its back. It said, “You are amazed at my shape, and in the castle is one who desires to speak to you.’ We entered the castle and we came upon a man who was shackled in steel, from his heels to his ears. One of his nostrils was blocked and one of his eyes was effaced. He said, ‘Who are you?’ We informed him, and he said, ‘What has lake Tabariyyah done?’ We said, ‘As it normally does.’ He said, ‘And what has the date-tree of Baisaan done?’ We said, ‘As it normally does.’ He said, ‘I shall set my foot on (every part of} earth except for the city of Ibraaheem (ie. Makkah) and Teebah.”” The Messenger of Allah #8 said, “Teebah is Al-Madeenah.” (Related by Al-Haafiz Abu Ya‘laa) This hadith is very Ghareeb. Abu Haatim said, “It is not solid.”

Tbn Sayyaad Is From The Jews Of Al-Madeenah

Jaabir ibn ‘Abdullah 4 said, “Verily, a woman from the Jews of AlMadeenah gave birth to a boy whose eye was effaced and whose canine tooth was (slanted) upwards. The Messenger of Allah 2 feared that he was the Dajjaal, and he then found him underneath a coarse garment mumbling. His mother went toward him and said,

96 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations o7

Messenger of Allah.” The Messenger of Allah #€ said, “If it is him, then you are not his companion (i.e. you will not be able to kill him), for indeed his companion (i.e. the one who will kill him) is ‘Eesa ibn Maryam. And if he is not him, then it is not for you to kill a man from the people of the ‘Ahd (i.e. those who have the right of safety and protection under the Muslims).” Jaabir said, “The Messenger of Allah # continued to fear that he was the Dajjaal.” (Ahmad) And this wording is very much Ghareeb.

98 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations
content_id:
Dan dalam riwayat lain lagi, Faatimah bint Qais # meriwayatkan bahwa, suatu hari, Rasulullah #¢ menunda shalat Isya terakhir; kemudian beliau keluar dan berkata, "Aku tertahan oleh sebuah hadith yang Tameem Ad-Daarie sedang ceritakan kepadaku tentang seorang laki-laki di sebuah pulau dari pulau-pulau di laut. (Ia berkata), 'Kemudian aku menemukan seorang wanita yang menyeret rambutnya. Aku berkata: Apa kamu? Ia berkata: Aku adalah Al-Jassaasah; pergilah ke kastil itu. Aku pergi ke sana dan menemukan seorang laki-laki yang menyeret rambutnya dan yang dibelenggu dalam rantai; ia melompat-lompat di dalamnya

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 95

antara langit dan bumi. Aku berkata: Siapakah kamu? Ia berkata: Aku adalah Dajjal. Ia (kemudian) berkata: Apa yang telah orang-orang Arab lakukan? Apakah Nabi mereka telah keluar? Aku berkata: Ya. Ia bertanya: Apakah mereka menaatinya atau mendurhakainya? Aku berkata: Bahkan, mereka menaatinya. Ia berkata: Itu lebih baik bagi mereka.'""

Abu Hurairah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah #% berdiri di atas mimbar dan berkata, "Tameem memberikan laporan kepadaku," kemudian beliau #8 melihat Tameem di satu sisi Masjid dan berkata, "Wahai Tameem, ceritakanlah kepada orang-orang apa yang kamu ceritakan kepadaku." Beliau #& berkata, "Kami sedang di sebuah pulau, ketika kami menemukan seekor binatang, tidak tahu mana depan dan mana belakangnya. Ia berkata, 'Kamu takjub dengan bentukku, dan di kastil ada seseorang yang ingin berbicara dengan kamu.' Kami memasuki kastil dan kami menemukan seorang laki-laki yang dibelenggu dengan besi, dari tumitnya hingga telinganya. Salah satu lubang hidungnya tersumbat dan salah satu matanya terhapus. Ia berkata, 'Siapakah kalian?' Kami memberitahunya, dan ia berkata, 'Apa yang telah danau Tabariyyah lakukan?' Kami berkata, 'Seperti biasanya.' Ia berkata, 'Dan apa yang telah pohon kurma Baisaan lakukan?' Kami berkata, 'Seperti biasanya.' Ia berkata, 'Aku akan menginjakkan kakiku di (setiap bagian dari) bumi kecuali kota Ibrahim (yaitu Makkah) dan Teebah.'" Rasulullah #8 berkata, "Teebah adalah Al-Madeenah." (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Haafidz Abu Ya'laa) Hadith ini sangat Gharib. Abu Haatim berkata, "Ia tidak solid."

Ibn Sayyaad Berasal dari Orang-Orang Yahudi Al-Madeenah

Jaabir ibn 'Abdullah # berkata, "Sungguh, seorang wanita dari kaum Yahudi Al-Madeenah melahirkan seorang bayi laki-laki yang matanya terhapus dan gigi taringnya (condong) ke atas. Rasulullah #% khawatir bahwa ia adalah Dajjal, dan kemudian beliau menemukan dia di bawah pakaian kasar yang sedang bergumam. Ibunya mendekatinya dan berkata,

96 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 97

Rasulullah." Rasulullah #€ berkata, "Jika itu adalah dia, maka kamu bukanlah temannya (yaitu kamu tidak akan mampu membunuhnya), karena sesungguhnya temannya (yaitu orang yang akan membunuhnya) adalah 'Isa ibn Maryam. Dan jika ia bukan dia, maka bukan hakmu untuk membunuh seorang laki-laki dari Ahlu Al-'Ahd (yaitu mereka yang berhak atas keselamatan dan perlindungan di bawah kaum Muslimin)." Jaabir berkata, "Rasulullah # terus khawatir bahwa ia adalah Dajjal." (Ahmad) Dan redaksi ini sangat Gharib.

98 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar
content_ar: And in yet another narration, Faatimah bint Qais % related that, on يوماً ما, الرسول ﷺ of الله #¢ delayed the last ‘Eesha; he then came out and said, “I was detained by a Hedeeth that Tameem AdDaaree was relating to me فيما يتعلق بـ a man on an island from the islands of the sea. (قال), ‘Then I came upon a woman who was dragging her hair. I said: what are you? It said: I am Al-Jassansah; go to that castle. I went to it and came upon a man who was dragging his hair and who was shackled in chains; he was springing in them الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 95 between the sky and the earth. I said: Who are you? قال: Tam the Dajjaal. He (then) said: What have the Arabs done? Has their النبي come out? I said: Yes. He asked: Did they obey him or disobey him? I said: Rather, they obeyed him. قال: That is better for them.”” أبو هريرة related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% stood level on the pulpit and said, “Tameem gave me an account,” and then he 38 saw Tameem on one side of the المسجد and said, “O Tameem, relate to the people that which you related to me.” He #& said, “We were on an island, عندما we came across a beast, not knowing its front from its back. It said, “You are amazed at my shape, and in the castle is one who desires to speak to you.’ We entered the castle and we came upon a man who was shackled in steel, from his heels to his ears. One of his nostrils was blocked and one of his eyes was effaced. قال, ‘Who are you?’ We informed him, and قال, ‘What has lake Tabariyyah done?’ We said, ‘As it normally does.’ قال, ‘And what has the date-tree of Baisaan done?’ We said, ‘As it normally does.’ قال, ‘I shall set my foot on (every part of} earth except for the city of Ibraaheem (ie. مكة المكرمة) and Teebah.”” الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 said, “Teebah is Al-Madeenah.” (Related by Al-Haafiz Abu Ya‘laa) This الحديث is very Ghareeb. Abu Haatim said, “It is not solid.” Tbn Sayyaad Is From The Jews Of Al-Madeenah Jaabir ibn ‘Abdullah 4 said, “Verily, a woman from the Jews of AlMadeenah gave birth to a boy whose eye was effaced and whose canine tooth was (slanted) upwards. الرسول ﷺ of الله 2 feared that he was the Dajjaal, and he then found him underneath a coarse garment mumbling. His الأم went toward him and said, 96 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations o7 Messenger of الله.” الرسول ﷺ of الله #€ said, “إذا it is him, then you are not his companion (i.e. you will not be able to kill him), for indeed his companion (i.e. the one who will kill him) is ‘Eesa ibn Maryam. And إذا he is not him, then it is not for you to kill a man from the people of the ‘Ahd (i.e. those who have the الحق of safety and protection under the المسلمون).” Jaabir said, “الرسول ﷺ of الله # continued to الخوف that he was the Dajjaal.” (أحمد) And this wording is very much Ghareeb. 98 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations
